inputs.label: Decimal Number
inputs.businessContext: The decimal integer to convert to hexadecimal. Non-negative, integer.

businessContext_i18n.en: The decimal integer to convert to hexadecimal. Non-negative, integer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ondalık tam sayıyı onaltılıya dönüştürün. Negatif olmayan, tam sayı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die dezimale Ganzzahl, die in Hexadezimal umgewandelt werden soll. Nicht negativ, ganzzahlig.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'entier décimal à convertir en hexadécimal. Non négatif, entier.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número entero decimal a convertir a hexadecimal. No negativo, entero.

inputs.label: Minimum Length
inputs.businessContext: Minimum number of hexadecimal digits. Pads with leading zeros if result is shorter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum number of hexadecimal digits. Pads with leading zeros if result is shorter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Minimum onaltılı basamak sayısı. Sonuç daha kısaysa başa sıfır ekler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mindestanzahl hexadezimaler Ziffern. Füllt mit führenden Nullen auf, wenn das Ergebnis kürzer ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre minimal de chiffres hexadécimaux. Ajoute des zéros non significatifs si le résultat est plus court.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número mínimo de dígitos hexadecimales. Rellena con ceros a la izquierda si el resultado es más corto.

inputs.label: Uppercase
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to output uppercase letters (A-F), 0 for lowercase (a-f).

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 to output uppercase letters (A-F), 0 for lowercase (a-f).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Büyük harf (A-F) çıktısı için 1, küçük harf (a-f) için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 setzen für Großbuchstaben (A-F), 0 für Kleinbuchstaben (a-f).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mettre à 1 pour afficher les lettres majuscules (A-F), 0 pour les minuscules (a-f).
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en 1 para generar letras mayúsculas (A-F), 0 para minúsculas (a-f).

businessContext_i18n.tr: 0: ön ek yok; 1: '0x' ön eki; 2: '0X' ön eki.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
